raw_consumer_statement:

After waiting on hold I get someone from a non-US country who wants to know the contents of the letter. It was not a letter, it was a memo. There is only XXXX XX/XX/XXXX memo. Give me the missing pages XXXX & XXXX. They can't handle it. 

Nor can XXXX CFPB, as I complained in complaint # XXXX. 

WHERE ARE PAGES XXXX XXXX XXXX 
WHERE IS THE {$560.00}XXXX 

cAN't wait to dump this stupid credit card. Happening soon.
